item.description:
Hey Incubators!

Let's assemble this Thursday at the Democracy Center for another awesome improv session! We'll be doing all sorts of games and activities to keep our minds and bodies happy, healthy and active!

No experience required! Everyone welcome!

Comments? Concerns? Get in contact with an organizer and we'll help ya best we can. We want everyone to have a great time learning the joys of improv!

There is a $3 suggested donation to cover the room rental fee and the costs associated with keeping up this website.

much improv love,
nikki
item.how_to_find_us: we will be in the small room immediately to your left, i'll put a sign on the door!
item.name: Everybody Was Improvising... :)
